steps.expected: Valid type returns only the requested AccountType and invalid type returns 400.
steps.observed: Valid filter status=200, nodeCount=6, only_assets=True; invalid type status=400, response={'success': False, 'message': "Invalid account type 'not-a-type'", 'data': {'traceId': '02feccb5-24a7-48a2-8dc6-b07f3667945f', 'reason': "Invalid account type 'not-a-type'", 'path': '/api/v1/accounting/accounts/tree/not-a-type', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': "Invalid account type 'not-a-type'", 'timestamp': '2026-04-22T09:16:31.807349588'}, 'timestamp': '2026-04-22T09:16:31.807424797Z'}.

steps.action: POST balanced manual journal entry with a MANUAL- referenceNumber request value
steps.expected: Balanced manual journal posts successfully with a generated reference number and equal debit/credit totals.
steps.observed: POST returned status=200, response referenceNumber=JRN-MOCK-202604-0001, lineCount=2, totalDebit=125.0, totalCredit=125.0.

steps.action: Replay the same MANUAL- reference with a matching payload, then a materially different payload
steps.expected: Matching replay returns the existing entry; materially different replay returns 400 and does not create a duplicate.
steps.observed: First POST status=200 id=15 canonicalReference=JRN-MOCK-202604-0001; matching replay status=200 id=15; changed replay status=400 with replay-conflict message body; journalCount=1.

assertions.title: Configuration health detects product account gaps

steps.action: Temporarily null FG-GST valuation_account_id, RM-RESIN inventory_account_id, and MOCK gst_output_tax_account_id one at a time, calling configuration-health after each mutation and restoring the original values.
steps.expected: Configuration health emits FINISHED_GOOD_ACCOUNT for FG-GST, RAW_MATERIAL_ACCOUNT for RM-RESIN, and TAX_ACCOUNT for missing GST wiring.
steps.observed: Baseline status=200; FG mutation domains=[('DEFAULT_ACCOUNTS', 'COMPANY_DEFAULTS', 'Missing default account IDs: defaultInventoryAccountId, defaultCogsAccountId, defaultRevenueAccountId, defaultDiscountAccountId, defaultTaxAccountId'), ('FINISHED_GOOD_ACCOUNT', 'FG-GST', 'Missing finished-good account wiring: valuation')]; RM mutation domains=[('DEFAULT_ACCOUNTS', 'COMPANY_DEFAULTS', 'Missing default account IDs: defaultInventoryAccountId, defaultCogsAccountId, defaultRevenueAccountId, defaultDiscountAccountId, defaultTaxAccountId'), ('RAW_MATERIAL_ACCOUNT', 'RM-RESIN', 'Inventory account is not configured')]; TAX mutation domains=[('DEFAULT_ACCOUNTS', 'COMPANY_DEFAULTS', 'Missing default account IDs: defaultInventoryAccountId, defaultCogsAccountId, defaultRevenueAccountId, defaultDiscountAccountId, defaultTaxAccountId'), ('TAX_ACCOUNT', 'GST_OUTPUT', 'GST output tax account is not configured')]; final status after restore=200.

frictions.description: The delegated user-testing-flow-validator Task helper exited without producing a report.
frictions.resolution: Validation fell back to direct in-session API/DB verification on the seeded compose runtime.

summary: Retested the four journal-and-account-core rerun assertions directly in-session on the seeded API/DB surface after the delegated flow-validator Task failed. All four assertions passed.
